title: Create a new project and enter the Editor
description: Verifies a user can create a project with a valid name from the Dashboard and is taken into the Editor view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill "Projeto Ensaio 01" into the project name field
Submit the create project action
Verify the Editor view is displayed

title: Add supported media by OS drag-and-drop to canvas and manipulate it
description: Verifies an image dragged from the OS onto the canvas becomes an element that can be selected, moved, and resized.

steps.description: Navigate to /
If the Dashboard is shown, create a project named "Projeto Canvas 01"
Drag and drop a supported image file from the OS onto the canvas
Select the newly added canvas element
Move the selected element to a different position on the canvas
Resize the selected element using the canvas resize handles
Verify the element remains visible on the canvas after move and resize

title: Add and activate scenes with canvas reflecting the active scene
description: This test verifies a user can create a new scene, switch between scenes, and the canvas updates to reflect the currently active scene.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click to add a new scene
Click to add a second new scene
Click the first scene in the scene list to make it active
Click the second scene in the scene list to make it active
Verify the canvas updates when switching the active scene

title: Keep elements stable when changing active scene and returning
description: Verifies an element added in a scene stays present after switching to another scene and switching back.

steps.description: Navigate to /
If the Dashboard is shown, create a project named "Projeto Cenas 01"
Add a new scene
Drag and drop a supported image file from the OS onto the canvas
Add another new scene
Activate the first scene in the scene list
Verify the previously added element is displayed on the canvas in the first scene

title: Prevent project creation without a name
description: Verifies creating a project with an empty name is blocked and a validation prompt is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill "" into the project name field
Submit the create project action
Verify a project name validation error is visible

title: Import an asset folder and drag an asset from sidebar to canvas
description: Verifies selecting a local folder populates the sidebar with supported assets and one can be dragged onto the canvas to create an element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
If the Dashboard is shown, create a project named "Projeto Assets 01"
Open the add-folder flow in the asset sidebar
Select a local folder that contains at least one supported image, video, or GIF
Drag a listed asset from the sidebar onto the canvas
Verify a new element appears on the canvas

title: Reorder scenes in the scene list
description: This test verifies a user can reorder scenes in the scene list and the new order remains visible after the drag completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click to add a new scene
Click to add another new scene
Click to add a third new scene
Drag one scene block in the scene list to a new position
Verify the scene list reflects the updated scene order

title: Add VHS pause and preview animation on the canvas
description: This test verifies a user can add a VHS pause and see a VHS-style animated preview filling the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-pause control in the scene list
Select the VHS pause option
Click the pause block in the scene list to make it active
Verify the canvas displays a VHS noise animation filling the canvas area

title: Element timeline appears when the active scene has elements
description: This test verifies that after adding an element to the canvas, the element timeline panel appears and shows a track for the element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add an image or text element to the active scene's canvas
Verify the element timeline panel is displayed below the canvas
Verify the added element is represented as a horizontal track in the timeline

title: Insert a black-screen pause and preview it on the canvas
description: This test verifies a user can add a Tela Preta pause block and preview it so the canvas shows a black pause state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click to add a new scene
Click the add-pause control in the scene list
Select the Tela Preta pause option
Click the pause block in the scene list to make it active
Verify the canvas displays a black pause preview filling the canvas area

title: Toggle transition type between scenes (CUT/FADE)
description: This test verifies a user can change the transition type between two scenes and the UI reflects the updated transition selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click to add a new scene
Click to add another new scene
Click the transition badge between the two scenes to toggle the transition type
Verify the transition indicator updates to the newly selected type

title: Adjust element start and end times via timeline handles without inversion
description: This test verifies a user can adjust an element’s start and end times using the timeline handles and the element visibility updates without producing an invalid inverted time range.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add an image or text element to the active scene's canvas
Drag the left handle of the element track to adjust the start time later
Drag the right handle of the element track to adjust the end time earlier but still after the start time
Verify the element visibility updates according to the adjusted timing window
Verify the resulting timing window remains valid with start time not exceeding end time

title: Split de texto em caracteres cria múltiplos elementos no canvas
description: Verifica que um texto adicionado no painel de lettering pode ser dividido em caracteres, resultando em múltiplos elementos independentes no canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the lettering panel entry in the header
Click to add a new text element
Fill PEG TEST into the text field
Click the control to split the text into individual characters
Verify the original single text element is replaced by multiple independent character elements on the canvas

title: Add solid-color pause and preview it on the canvas
description: This test verifies a user can add a Cor Sólida pause and the canvas shows a solid color fill during preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-pause control in the scene list
Select the Cor Sólida pause option
Click the pause block in the scene list to make it active
Verify the canvas displays a solid-color pause preview filling the canvas area

title: Configurar fonte, tamanho, cor e efeito antes do split mantém o split funcionando
description: Verifica que alterar fonte, tamanho, cor e efeito no painel de lettering não impede o split em caracteres e mantém os caracteres como elementos separados no canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the lettering panel entry in the header
Click to add a new text element
Fill STYLE TEST into the text field
Select a different font family from the font dropdown
Adjust the font size control to a different valid value
Pick a different valid text color from the color picker
Select a non-default animation effect
Click the control to split the text into individual characters
Verify multiple character elements appear on the canvas reflecting the updated styling and effect configuration

title: Split em letras individuais resulta em elementos selecionáveis individualmente
description: Verifica que após o split, o usuário consegue selecionar um único caractere como um elemento independente no canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the lettering panel entry in the header
Click to add a new text element
Fill SELECT ME into the text field
Click the control to split the text into individual characters
Click on a single character element on the canvas
Verify exactly one character element is selected on the canvas

title: Trocar efeitos de lettering não quebra a visualização do elemento de texto
description: Verifica que alternar entre os efeitos (incluindo Nenhum) mantém o elemento de texto visível e editável no canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the lettering panel entry in the header
Click to add a new text element
Fill EFFECT TEST into the text field
Select the Tremor effect
Select the Neon effect
Select the Letreiro effect
Select the no-effect option
Verify the text element remains visible on the canvas after switching effects

title: Element timeline is hidden or shows empty state for scenes with no elements
description: This test verifies that when the active scene has no elements, the element timeline is not shown or presents an empty-state instead of tracks.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click to add a new scene
Ensure the newly added scene is the active scene
Verify the element timeline panel is not displayed or an empty-state is shown

title: Split de texto preserva a contagem de caracteres como elementos individuais
description: Verifica que o número de elementos após o split corresponde aos caracteres digitados (desconsiderando regras internas como espaços, se aplicável).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the lettering panel entry in the header
Click to add a new text element
Fill ABCD into the text field
Click the control to split the text into individual characters
Verify four character elements are present on the canvas

title: Reject unsupported file types dropped on canvas
description: Verifies dropping an unsupported file type on the canvas does not create an element and shows a rejection outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to /
If the Dashboard is shown, create a project named "Projeto Rejeicao 01"
Drag and drop an unsupported file type from the OS onto the canvas
Verify no new canvas element is added or a rejected-file notification is visible

title: Pause duration is fixed and cannot be edited after creation
description: This test verifies that after creating a pause, the user cannot modify its duration and the UI prevents editing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click to add a new scene
Click the add-pause control in the scene list
Select the Tela Preta pause option
Click the pause block in the scene list to make it active
Attempt to edit the pause duration
Verify the pause duration cannot be changed after creation

title: Adicionar texto sem cena ativa exige seleção/criação de cena
description: Verifica que ao tentar adicionar texto quando não há cena ativa, o app bloqueia a ação e orienta o usuário a selecionar ou criar uma cena.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Ensure no scene is active in the editor context
Click the lettering panel entry in the header
Click to add a new text element
Verify a prompt is shown indicating an active scene is required before adding text

title: Cancel folder selection without changing sidebar state
description: Verifies canceling the add-folder picker does not add assets and the sidebar remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /
If the Dashboard is shown, create a project named "Projeto Cancelar Pasta 01"
Open the add-folder flow in the asset sidebar
Cancel the folder selection dialog
Verify no new assets are added to the sidebar

title: Solid-color pause duration remains fixed after creation
description: This test verifies that a Cor Sólida pause does not allow duration editing after it is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-pause control in the scene list
Select the Cor Sólida pause option
Click the pause block in the scene list to make it active
Attempt to change the pause duration after creation
Verify the pause duration remains fixed and cannot be modified

title: Texto vazio não gera split em caracteres
description: Verifica que tentar dividir em caracteres sem fornecer texto não cria elementos de caracteres no canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the lettering panel entry in the header
Click to add a new text element
Ensure the text field is empty
Click the control to split the text into individual characters
Verify no character elements are created on the canvas
